title: 1950 Korea: The Forgotten War
notes: First game in the Procedural Combat System (PCS). Strategic scale, the Korean War.

title: 1995: Milosevic's Last Gamble
notes: PCS. A hypothetical NATO vs Russia/Serbia ground war.
PCS. The Yom Kippur War across the Sinai and Syria.

title: 2022: Ukraine
notes: PCS. The Russian invasion of Ukraine; the most event-driven game in the series.

title: We Were Not Cowards: Sedan 1870
notes: First game in the Imperial Bayonets series. The Franco-Prussian War.

title: For Liberty & Lombardy: 1859
notes: Imperial Bayonets. The Second Italian War of Independence.

title: 1854: The Alma
notes: A simplified solitaire Imperial Bayonets variant. The Crimean War.

title: Barbarossa Deluxe
notes: Destroy All Monsters Operational Series (DAMOS). The 1941 German invasion of the USSR.

title: Afrika Army Korps
notes: DAMOS. The North Africa campaign, 1940-43.
Verdun. Administrative Points as the central resource. Version 2.0 released 2021.

title: Sedan 1940
notes: Grand-tactical. The 1940 Battle of Sedan. Dedicated to John Tiller.

title: Koniggratz
notes: Herman-lineage system. The 1866 Battle of Koniggratz.

title: Marathon
notes: First game in the Violent Schoolmaster Tactical Series. The Battle of Marathon, 490 BC.

title: At Villers Cotterets: Mons 1914
notes: Tactical, purely fire-based. The 1914 Battle of Mons. Release year unverified.

title: Prigozhin's March of Justice
notes: Solitaire. The June 2023 Wagner Group mutiny. Year approximate — verify.

title: The Great Northern War
notes: Card-driven trick-taking using a standard deck. Release year unverified.

title: With the Hammer
notes: An asymmetric area-movement game on the German Peasants' War, 1524-25. Release year unverified.

title: 1914: East Prussia: The World Undone
notes: The World Undone series. The Tannenberg campaign. Release year unverified.

title: 1914: Galicia: The World Undone
notes: The World Undone series. The 1914 Galician battles. Release year unverified.

title: 1914: Serbia: The World Undone
notes: The World Undone series. The 1914 Austro-Serbian front. Completed 2021 per contemporaneous record.

title: The World Undone East Front Trilogy
notes: Campaign rules linking East Prussia, Galicia, and Serbia. Release year unverified.

title: Risorgimento
notes: Long Century Operations Series. The 1859 Italian war. Release year unverified.

title: Mars La Tour
notes: Herman-lineage system. The 1870 Battle of Mars-la-Tour. Release year unverified.

title: Rostov 41
notes: The one wargame published by a company other than CSL. Went to pre-order with MMP in 2018.

title: Guns of the Americas: American Front 1914-1919
notes: Alternate-history game — a transposed First World War across North America. Received a publisher contract in 2018; publication never materialized.

title: Shellfire & Fury
notes: A pre-WWI naval gunnery design, also worked under the title Steam & Shell. Submitted and rejected in 2018.

title: 1705: Along the Dyle
notes: Designed as an expansion for OSG's Napoleon's Last Gamble series; publication did not materialize. Verify.

title: C R E E P
notes: Le Rug album. Release year unverified.

title: Swelling
notes: Le Rug album. Release year unverified.

title: Goodnight
notes: Le Rug release. Release year unverified.

title: Game Over
notes: Le Rug album. Release year unverified.

title: Party With Peter Burns
notes: A previously unreleased 2017 Le Rug record, released in 2021.

title: Cut Off Your Dick And Turn Into Slime
notes: Tracked and completed in early 2014. Band attribution unverified.

title: True Crime
notes: Butter The Children album. Release year unverified.

title: Butter The Children EP
notes: Butter The Children EP. Release year unverified.

title: Bleenex
notes: A 13-track album from the Le Rug / Bleenex material. Verify title and band.

title: Defenestrator
notes: A noisy/ambient EP recorded during 2021. Verify.

title: Bozo
notes: Defenestrator release. Release year unverified.

title: I Can Fight This Feeling
notes: Living Serious release. Release year unverified.

title: Anyone But Hindenburg
notes: A 13-track album opening with 'Der Netanyahu'. Band and year unverified.

title: Tell Your Parents You Want Ballz This Christmas
notes: Red Dwarf album. Release year unverified.

title: Flabby Wings
notes: Solo release. Release year unverified.

title: Big Bird at Nuremburg EP
notes: Solo EP. Release year unverified.

title: America
notes: Album opening with 'Pat Buchanan'. Band and year unverified.

title: Sex Reduction Flower
notes: Band and year unverified.

title: She Said
notes: Band and year unverified.

title: Sticky Buns
notes: Band and year unverified.

title: Nuke Whales
notes: An album with a U.S.-presidents song cycle (George Washington, John Adams, Thomas Jefferson...). Band and year unverified.

title: Ersatz EP
notes: Band and year unverified.

title: Dead In A Hole EP
notes: Band and year unverified.

title: Untitled 2021 album
notes: Roughly 30 songs lost to a hard-drive failure in early 2021; MP3 versions of some tracks were recovered later. The clearest single illustration of why this catalog exists.

title: SoundCloud instrumental demos
notes: A large body of instrumental demos posted to SoundCloud over many years. Individual tracks not yet catalogued.

title: Cyberpanky N.O.W.
notes: An OSR cyberpunk tabletop RPG, written years earlier and released pay-what-you-want in December 2018.

title: Pickett
notes: A summer-camp-set narrative PC game announced in 2014. Abandoned.

title: Untitled NES game
notes: An NES homebrew built in Python compiling to 6502 assembly, with collaborator Tom Ritchford. Abandoned.

title: Flappy Snoop
notes: A quick mobile game announced in 2014. Abandoned.

title: The Bird Didn't Run
notes: An essay published on the personal site.

title: Clever Lazy: The Hammerstein Method
notes: A book on the Hammerstein method, in progress for Kindle Direct Publishing.

title: Veridian Contraption
notes: A Rust terminal world-simulation game, in Early Access on itch.io. Year and status verify.
